app.name: إدارة
app.tagline: Take control of your Android device

language.title: Choose Your Language
language.subtitle: Select your preferred language to get started

setup.title: Enable USB Debugging
setup.subtitle: Follow these steps to connect your Android device

steps.1: Open Settings on your Android device
steps.3: Tap Build Number 7 times to enable Developer Mode
steps.4: Go back to Settings → Developer Options
steps.6: Connect your device via USB cable
steps.7: Tap Allow on the USB debugging prompt

setup.unauthorized: Device found but not authorized — tap "Allow" on your phone
setup.offline: Device is offline — reconnect the USB cable

device.disconnectDesc: Stop managing this device and return to the connect screen
device.noneDesc: Connect your Android device via USB and make sure USB debugging is enabled.
device.unauthorizedDesc: Unlock your phone and tap "Allow" on the USB debugging prompt, then it will appear here.
device.offlineDesc: The device isn't responding. Reconnect the USB cable or restart ADB from Settings.

apps.title: Installed Apps
apps.subtitle: Uninstall or disable apps on your device

delete.title: Confirm Uninstall
delete.subtitle: You're about to uninstall the following apps
delete.warning: Uninstalling for the current user is reversible — restore anytime from the Restore section.

disable.confirmMsg: Disable {{n}} app(s)? They stay installed but won't run until re-enabled.

password.title: Recovery Password
password.subtitle: Set a password to protect app restoration
password.recoveryHint: Time to wait before you can restore without the password
password.forgotDesc: You set a wait period before recovery is allowed without a password.
password.unlocked: The wait period has ended — you can restore these apps now.

restore.title: Restore Apps
restore.subtitle: Previously uninstalled apps
restore.noAppsDesc: Apps you uninstall will appear here, ready to bring back.
restore.needDevice: Connect your device to restore these apps.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Preferences, security and device options
settings.resetPasswordDesc: Remove the recovery password. Locked apps can then be restored once their wait period ends.
settings.clearHistoryDesc: Remove restored apps from history. Apps still uninstalled are kept so you can restore them.
